props.name: adapters
props.description: Policy: where uploads go, how mentions resolve, how toasts show.

props.name: features
props.description: Which optional plugins to enable (absent adapters win over `true`).

props.name: locale
props.description: UI language for toolbar labels / placeholders.

props.name: placeholderMode
props.description: When the placeholder shows: `'doc'` (default) only while the whole editor is empty (the conventional empty-state hint); `'block'` on any empty block at the cursor (Notion style — a hint on every new empty line).

props.name: scrollSync
props.description: Sync scrolling between the split panes. Default `true`; set `false` to disable (or toggle it at runtime via the view-switch API).

props.name: selectionToolbar
props.description: The floating toolbar shown on text selection. `true` (default) = the standard buttons; `false` = off; or pass an ordered `KunSelectionItem[]` to reorder / subset them (`'|'` is a divider). Its look is styled via the `.kun-editor__bubble` / `.kun-editor__bubble-btn` class hooks.

props.name: views
props.description: Which view modes to offer in the switch. Default all three. Drop `'split'` (or use just `['wysiwyg']`) for compact editors like a reply/comment box — a single-mode `views` hides the switch bar entirely.
